description: PrestaShop Known Vulnerabilities (CVEs) compiled from Friends-Of-Presta security advisories and public CVE databases

vulnerabilities.description: Blind SQL injection via TAXANGULAR_GROUP_* cookies in the webservice output
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check for exposed webservice endpoints and custom tax rules

vulnerabilities.description: Cross-site scripting in the back office pages leading to potential remote code execution
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check back office templates for injected script tags

vulnerabilities.description: SQL injection in the back office controllers via unsanitized user input
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Review back office controller parameters

vulnerabilities.description: Blind SQL injection via multiple parameters in the back office
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Audit back office parameter handling

vulnerabilities.description: Persistent XSS in the Product Page back office
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check product description and title fields for script injection

vulnerabilities.description: SQL injection in the back office via unsanitized parameters
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check for parameter manipulation in back office URLs

vulnerabilities.description: Persistent XSS in the back office order page
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Review order-related template files for escaping vulnerabilities

vulnerabilities.description: Reflected XSS in the back office via crafted URL parameters
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Test back office URLs with XSS payloads in query parameters

vulnerabilities.description: CSRF token validation bypass in the back office
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check CSRF token implementation in back office forms

vulnerabilities.description: SQL injection in the Product listing page via sort order parameter
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check product listing pages for unsanitized sort parameters

vulnerabilities.description: Path traversal in the back office image upload functionality
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Review image upload handling for path traversal protections

vulnerabilities.description: Remote code execution via template injection in the back office
vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check template rendering for user-controlled input

vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Audit back office filter parameters for SQLi vectors

vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check product title output escaping in product pages

vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Review module upload restrictions and file validation

vulnerabilities.detection_hint: Check redirect parameters for validation
